name: team-rocket
description: Three-role process (implementer / reviewer / memory) for multi-session software work, focused on the quality of what ships: correct, simple, honest, right-sized, maintainable code. Runs on the Archon harness by default; a native live-cluster mode (Claude Code Agent Teams) is optional until that feature is GA. TDD, live review, named code smells, and deterministic guardrails are means to that end, not the goal.
